ColdPath._comment: 3, 4, 5 = factory-v0-iron-ore/-plate/-gear, seeded by seed-recipes.sh (mirrors data/recipes-v0.toml). 1, 2 were the original ASM-00001/RAW-00001 demo-data proof.

Sim._comment: Sim core hosting (D15/D18). ContentPath is relative to the adapter's content root. TICK_RATE is NOT here - it comes from recipes-v0.toml [meta] tick_hz. EmitEveryNTicks throttles the sim.tick hub push from sim rate to render rate (contract §3 says 'throttled' but names no rate); 3 @ 60Hz = 20Hz.
